Central Hub

Reports & Export

Generate network-wide reports on academic performance, pacing progress, staff activity, and Cambridge compliance. Export to CSV for board or leadership review.

Back to Dashboard

Academic Pacing

Network Pacing Summary

Average pacing completion per school and per subject across all Cambridge programmes.

—
SchoolCityTeachersAvg Progress

Teachers Behind Pacing

List of teachers whose pacing completion falls below a threshold — for coordinator follow-up.

—
TeacherEmailSchoolSubjectProgress

Checklist Compliance

Checklist Completion by School

Weekly checklist submission rate per school, broken down by role (teacher, subject leader, coordinator).

—
SchoolSubmittedTotal StaffCompletion

Survey Engagement

Survey Response Rates

Response count per published survey, by platform. Identify surveys with low engagement.

—
SurveyStatusPlatformsResponsesCreated

Announcement Readership

Announcement Read Receipts

How many users opened each announcement. Identify announcements that have not reached the audience.

—
AnnouncementPublishedPlatformsRead count
